title: mixed blocking and non-blocking assignment on dfferent slices of vector

features.name: vector slice declaration starting at non-zero bit
features.description: Code should include a reg/variable declaration with a slice range that starts at a non-zero bit position (e.g., [15:1] instead of [14:0])

features.name: mixed blocking and non-blocking assignment on different vector slices
features.description: Code should include a blocking assignment to one slice of a vector and a non-blocking assignment to a different slice of the same vector

features.name: for generate with multiple always blocks
features.description: Code should include a for-generate loop that creates multiple always blocks, which may trigger false-positive conflict detection in some tools
features.snippet:
genvar i;
generate
for (i=2;i<=15;i=i+1) begin: T1
  always @(posedge clk) begin
    valu_en_ex[i] <= valu_en_ex[i-1];
  end
  always @(posedge clk) begin
    if (valu_en_ex[i-1]) t0_ex[i] <= t0_ex[i-1];
  end
end
endgenerate

features.name: array of registers in generate
features.description: Code should include a two-dimensional array of registers declared inside a generate block
